title: Publish signed Podman*.msi
body:
Many organization blocks non signed applications, including mine.

It would be great if the Podman.msi is signed and published.

I have checked recent released version and that is not signed.

[v4.2.1](https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v4.2.1)

comments.body: Yup, this will really help me absorb the product into my organization too.

I have good news here, this is already implemented and coming in 4.3 (soon to be released). https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/15610

(Note that this changed to a signed setup.exe from a flat msi file - further all components within are also signed (e.g. podman.exe, win-sshproxy.exe etc)
